creator: sergey.v.brunov@gmail.com
text:
Hello!

It would be great to have Light Table editor (http://lighttable.com/) in the ports tree.

Description (from https://github.com/LightTable/LightTable):
"Light Table is a next generation code editor that connects you to your creation with instant feedback. Light Table is very customizable and can display anything a Chromium browser can."

Best regards,
Sergey Brunov.
